name: Ruth Epstein's Nesselrode Pudding/Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 ounce grated semisweet chocolate for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, dissolve the gelatin in the rum and cold water; set aside to soften.
2. In a saucepan, scald the cream and milk. Remove from heat and set aside to cool slightly.
3. In the top of a double boiler off the heat, whisk together the salt, 2 tablespoons sugar, and the egg yolks. In a steady stream, add the milk and cream to the mixture, stirring constantly.
4. Set the top of the double boiler over simmering water and cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture is thick, about 10 minutes. Do not boil. Remove from heat and stir in the gelatin mixture. Set aside.
5. In a bowl, beat the egg whites with remaining 1/4 cup sugar until stiff peaks form. Fold Nesselrode into the egg whites, then fold the mixture into the reserved gelatin mixture. Cover and refrigerate for 5 minutes.
6. Turn mixture into pie shell or spoon into 8 parfait glasses. Chill until firm. Garnish with chocolate shavings.
